subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual lad! May God uphold thee and edify thee in the flower of thy youth and in the spring-time of thy life and may He illumine thy face
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الولد الروحانی ایدک الله و شیدک فی نعومه اظفارک و بحبوحه صباک و نور وجهک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
